reasoning: The Lean signature precisely matches the informal statement of Baire's theorem. The hypotheses `[MetricSpace X] [CompleteSpace X] [Nonempty X]` directly correspond to "nonempty complete metric space". The function `G : ℕ → Set X` with `∀ n, IsOpen (G n) ∧ Dense (G n)` matches "sequence of dense open sets". The conclusion `∃ x, ∀ n, x ∈ G n` is exactly equivalent to "⋂ G_n is nonempty". The informal indexing from 1 vs. Lean's ℕ starting from 0 is an immaterial relabeling of the same countable sequence.
